title: 微信小微扩大测试可生成小程序
full_text:
WeChat expanded grayscale testing of 小微 (Xiaowei) on June 20 — a conversational assistant built into the main app, run by text or voice. It operates WeChat’s native functions and calls mini programs to complete tasks: ride-hailing, food delivery, hotel booking, package https://t.co/nK9U1hVtqP
